goal: Define the document-only Scope Resolver Handoff Contract between Phase Scanner output and later Builder scope resolution.
claims: BP-044 defines the Phase Scanner to Scope Resolver handoff as a document-only contract.
BP-044 specifies required inputs, outputs, fail behavior, and blocked behavior.
BP-044 does not implement, import, or call Builder scope resolver code.
assumptions: Builder Scope Resolver is a donor boundary but not directly available in this repo.
A contract is needed before local mock or adapter implementation.
Task creation remains blocked until Scope Resolver handoff is implemented and reviewed.
dod: The document defines handoff input envelope, output envelope, required fields, fail behavior, and non-goals.
The document explicitly blocks live Builder calls, task creation, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, execute, approve, and push.
stop_conditions: Runtime, fixture, package, or tool changes become necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, execution, task creation, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-043 identified Scope Resolver Handoff Contract as the next non-live MVP boundary after Phase Scanner.
